eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Pueblo; Custer, CO; at 8:47 AM on JUL 1, 2026 Effective until 7:47 AM JUL 2, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Pueblo County Alert: Due to a wildland fire the homes in part of the Red Creek Ranches area, north of highway 78, south of highway 96, and west of Siloam Rd are under pre-evacuation. Please prepare to evacuate, winds and other factors contribute to very fast movement of fire. Pre-evac at this time. pre evac
